requirement_topic.en: STEG Grid Connection and Site Electrical Approval
requirement_topic.zh: STEG电网接入与现场电气批准
requirement_topic.zht: STEG電網接入與現場電氣批准

summary.en: EV charger installations in Tunisia should be coordinated with STEG or the relevant site electricity authority for service capacity, connection works, tariffs, metering, protection, earthing, load management, and any medium-voltage or low-voltage connection conditions. STEG's public portal identifies electricity connection, tariffs, procedures, and protection-relay approval topics, but the binding requirements are normally project and connection-point specific.
summary.zh: 突尼斯充电桩安装应与STEG或相关现场供电主管方协调服务容量、接入工程、电价、计量、保护、接地、负荷管理以及任何中压或低压接入条件。STEG官网列有电力接入、电价、程序和保护继电器认可事项，但有约束力的要求通常取决于项目和接入点。
summary.zht: 突尼西亞充電樁安裝應與STEG或相關現場供電主管方協調服務容量、接入工程、電價、計量、保護、接地、負荷管理以及任何中壓或低壓接入條件。STEG官網列有電力接入、電價、程序和保護繼電器認可事項，但有約束力的要求通常取決於項目和接入點。

standards_or_laws: STEG electricity connection and service procedures
STEG tariff and metering requirements where applicable

summary.en: China-side factory files may include GB/T 18487, GB/T 20234, EMC reports, and grid input ratings. These do not replace Tunisia site load studies, STEG connection approval, local protection settings, earthing design, metering requirements, or installer sign-off.
summary.zh: 中国侧工厂资料可能包括GB/T 18487、GB/T 20234、EMC报告和电网输入额定值。这些资料不能替代突尼斯现场负荷研究、STEG接入批准、当地保护整定、接地设计、计量要求或安装方签署。
summary.zht: 中國側工廠資料可能包括GB/T 18487、GB/T 20234、EMC報告和電網輸入額定值。這些資料不能替代突尼西亞現場負荷研究、STEG接入批准、當地保護整定、接地設計、計量要求或安裝方簽署。

standards_or_laws: China project grid-connection documents where available

gap.en: Before installation, obtain the actual Tunisia connection conditions and prepare a single-line diagram, load schedule, harmonic or power-quality evidence where requested, protection coordination, earthing plan, metering plan, and commissioning procedure aligned with STEG and site requirements.
gap.zh: 安装前应取得突尼斯实际接入条件，并准备符合STEG和现场要求的单线图、负荷表、适用时的谐波或电能质量证据、保护配合、接地方案、计量方案和调试程序。
gap.zht: 安裝前應取得突尼西亞實際接入條件，並準備符合STEG和現場要求的單線圖、負荷表、適用時的諧波或電能品質證據、保護配合、接地方案、計量方案和調試程序。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for connection, energization, tariff, metering, or site approval where STEG or the relevant electricity authority applies project-specific conditions
mandatory_status.cn: China factory conformity evidence is not a substitute for Tunisia grid-connection or site electrical approval

source.publisher: Societe Tunisienne de l'Electricite et du Gaz (STEG)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not ship a high-power EVSE configuration on factory ratings alone. Tunisia energization depends on the actual STEG or site connection route and approved installation design.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅凭工厂额定值出货大功率EVSE配置。突尼斯送电取决于实际STEG或现场接入路径以及获批安装设计。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅憑工廠額定值出貨大功率EVSE配置。突尼西亞送電取決於實際STEG或現場接入路徑以及獲批安裝設計。
